steps.title: Use the requested input
steps.content: The variable $x$ is the number of years after the 2000 census. Two years after the census means $x=2$.

steps.title: Read and convert
steps.content: At $x=2$, the graph is about $4.3$ on the $y$-axis. Since $y$ is measured in thousands, $$ 4.3\cdot1{,}000=4{,}300 $$ The answer is C.
